sql_array: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_data (id UInt32, value1 Float64, value2 Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value1, value2) VALUES (1, 10.0, 20.0), (2, 15.5, 25.5), (3, 14.0, 30.0);
UPDATE test_data SET value1 = value1 + 5 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, covarSamp(value1, value2) AS covariance FROM test_data GROUP BY id;
SELECT covarSamp(value1, value2) FROM (SELECT value1, value2 FROM test_data WHERE id > 1) AS filtered_data;
